channel.title: STG - Moore Theatre
channel.description: Upcoming events for STG - Moore Theatre

item.title: Goran Bregovic
item.description:
Friday, March 27, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Moore Theatre, 1932 2nd Ave, Seattle, WA

The Moore Theatre is located in downtown Seattle at 1932 2nd Ave, Seattle, WA 98101. There is an overall 9 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders canceled at the venue's discretion. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. There is no elevator. Stairs only to the balcony level. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety There is no elevator. Stairs only to the balcony level. When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email or phone if any assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us by email at accessibility@stgpresents.org or call us at 206-682-1414 ext. 5. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. The freestanding chair can be removed to accommodate a wheelchair.

Event details

item.title: Rene Vaca 2026 Tour
item.description:
Saturday, March 28, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Moore Theatre, 1932 2nd Ave, Seattle, WA

18+ Age Restriction The Moore Theatre is located in downtown Seattle at 1932 2nd Ave, Seattle, WA 98101. There is an overall 8 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders canceled at the venue's discretion. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Stairs only to the balcony level. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety 18+ Age Restriction When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email if assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us at accessibility@stgpresents.org. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. Please note that our historic theatre has no elevator to the balcony levels. The ADA section on the seating map does not represent a specific seat location.

Event details

Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. There is no elevator. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email if assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us at accessibility@stgpresents.org. item.title: The Format
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 6:50 PM

Location: Moore Theatre, 1932 2nd Ave, Seattle, WA

The Format will donate $1 from every ticket sold to help fight food insecurity and fund local animal shelters. This is a sponsored project of Catalyst Philanthropy Fund, a 501(c)(3) public charity. The Moore Theatre is located in downtown Seattle at 1932 2nd Ave, Seattle, WA 98101. There is an overall 4 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders canceled at the venue's discretion. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Mobile barcodes and ticket transfer delayed until 72 hours prior to event. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. There is no elevator. Stairs only to the balcony level. The Format will donate $1 from every ticket sold to help fight food insecurity and fund local animal shelters. This is a sponsored project of Catalyst Philanthropy Fund, a 501(c)(3) public charity. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety. Mobile barcodes and ticket transfer delayed until 72 hours prior to event There is no elevator. Stairs only to the balcony level. When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email or phone if any assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us by email at accessibility@stgpresents.org or call us at 206-682-1414 ext. 5. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. The freestanding chair can be removed to accommodate a wheelchair.

Event details

item.title: Urgant Live - First Time in North America
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Moore Theatre, 1932 2nd Ave, Seattle, WA

This show is in Russian with no English translation. The Moore Theatre is located in downtown Seattle at 1932 2nd Ave, Seattle, WA 98101. 8 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders canceled at the venue's discretion. Ticket transferring has been delayed for this event until 7 days prior to the show. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. There is no elevator. Stairs & ramps only to the balcony level. Parties who require accessible seating will have priority to accessible seats. Ushers are available to assist when you arrive. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email if assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us at accessibility@stgpresents.org. item.title: Wednesday: Wednesday Bleeds Tour 2026
item.description:
Thursday, April 23, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Moore Theatre, 1932 2nd Ave, Seattle, WA

The Moore Theatre is located in downtown Seattle at 1932 2nd Ave, Seattle, WA 98101. Wednesday has partnered with PLUS1 so that $1 from every ticket sold will go to support local organizations addressing hunger and food insecurity in their communities. This is a general admission event. The ADA section on the seating map does not represent a specific seat location. There is an overall 4 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders canceled at the venue's discretion. TM+ Resale has been disabled, and ticket transferring has been delayed until 7 days prior to the event. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. There is no elevator. Stairs only to the balcony level. Wednesday has partnered with PLUS1 so that $1 from every ticket sold will go to support local organizations addressing hunger and food insecurity in their communities. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety There is no elevator. Stairs only to the balcony level. When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email or phone if any assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us by email at accessibility@stgpresents.org or call us at 206-682-1414 ext. 5. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. The freestanding chair can be removed to accommodate a wheelchair. There is an overall 4 ticket limit per patron. TM+ Resale has been disabled, and ticket transferring has been delayed until 7 days prior to the event.

There is no elevator. Stairs & ramps only to the balcony level. Parties who require accessible seating will have priority to accessible seats. Ushers are available to assist when you arrive. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety There is no elevator. Stairs only to the balcony level. When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email or phone if any assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us by email at accessibility@stgpresents.org or call us at 206-682-1414 ext. 5. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. The freestanding chair can be removed to accommodate a wheelchair.

Event details

item.description:
Saturday, May 16, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Moore Theatre, 1932 2nd Ave, Seattle, WA

The Moore Theatre is located in downtown Seattle at 1932 2nd Ave, Seattle, WA 98101. 8 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders canceled at the venue's discretion. Ticket transferring has been disabled for this event. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. item.title: American Football
item.description:
Tuesday, May 19, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Moore Theatre, 1932 2nd Ave, Seattle, WA

American Football has partnered with PLUS1 so that $1 from every ticket sold on our tour will go towards organizations protecting immigrant rights and supporting deportees, migrants and refugees. www.plus1.org The Moore Theatre is located in downtown Seattle at 1932 2nd Ave, Seattle, WA 98101. 4 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders canceled at the venue's discretion. Ticket transferring has been delayed for this event until 72hrs before the show. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. There is no elevator. Stairs & ramps only to the balcony level. Parties who require accessible seating will have priority to accessible seats. Ushers are available to assist when you arrive.
